definition: Root ODPR workflow document that declares metadata, type, execution policy, context policy, steps, gates, and review expectations.
doUseFor: Describing CI, release, localization, hybrid, or agent-safe workflows

definition: One declared operation in an ODPR recipe, such as generate, validate, portfolio.build, portfolio.localize, portfolio.explain, or odpg.build.
doUseFor: Overriding provider references for one operation

definition: Runtime policy that declares whether a recipe expects local, hosted, hybrid, or model-free execution.
doUseFor: Declaring local, hosted, hybrid, or none execution modes
Referencing an execution provider without defining provider internals

definition: Policy for preferred workflow context format such as YAML, TOON, GCF, or automatic fallback.
doUseFor: Preferring GCF or TOON sidecars when available
Making prompt and review context explicit
doNotUseFor: Embedding full document bodies in recipes

definition: Validation, quality, approval, or review condition that must be checked during recipe execution.
